title: Energizing British Butter Fry
description: A velvety and buttery dish featuring apricot jam as a key ingredient, perfect for an energizing breakfast.

ingredients.name: Vegetable Garnish (optional)
ingredients.amount: Grated lemon zest or edible flowers
ingredients.notes: To enhance the dish's aesthetic appeal

instructions: Whisk together the apricot jam, vegetable oil, breadcrumbs, thyme leaves, and a pinch of salt in a mixing bowl until well combined.
Place the bowl with the mixture on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or aluminum foil.
Bake for about 12 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
Serve warm alongside your choice of breakfast items. Garnish with optional vegetable garnish if desired.
